nodes.label: AI reliability and factuality
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable source requiring full manual verification
nodes.grounding_span: I can take a twenty minute job and whittle it down to a few minutes

nodes.label: AI as drafting assistant for emails
nodes.label_negative: AI as autonomous writer producing impersonal output
nodes.grounding_span: I give it scaffolding and then work back and forth with it to get what I want

nodes.label: AI as tool for career advancement
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to job relevance
nodes.grounding_span: I'm using AI to help me identify places where I can remain relevant in an AI dominated world

nodes.label: AI as research starting point
nodes.label_negative: Traditional search methods leading to dead ends
nodes.grounding_span: ChatGPT is almost like a co-worker I turn to and say, 'Hey, do you think I'm thinking of this the right way?'

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I can take a twenty minute job and whittle it down to a few minutes

nodes.label: Professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: All the information I provide my employer has to be bulletproof

nodes.label: Career resilience and adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: I'm using AI to help me identify places where I can remain relevant in an AI dominated world

nodes.label: Epistemic accuracy and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I may have to clarify something that doesn't make sense to me and ask a question about whatever topic I'm researching so I better understand it

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for time-saving
nodes.grounding_span: I'd say it satisfies more than frustrates because I can take a twenty minute job and whittle it down to a few minutes

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors and broken links
nodes.grounding_span: It frustrates me when it obviously gets things wrong or I have to go back and redo the same prompt because it's forgotten my instructions

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I think, if anything, I'll use it more and more

nodes.label: Concern about colleagues' over-reliance on AI
nodes.grounding_span: I don't tell anyone my process because I know how a lot of people feel about AI

nodes.label: Verification-oriented — cross-checks AI outputs against other sources
nodes.grounding_span: I double-check everything because I have to

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I give it scaffolding and then work back and forth with it to get what I want
